title: CNBC Daily Open: Hormuz toll threats, Mideast tensions keep investors on edge
summary_full: Dwindling hopes of a Mideast peace deal and a tech sell-off sent U.S. benchmark indexes lower overnight, while Asia markets traded lower Tuesday.
summary_public: Dwindling hopes of a Mideast peace deal and a tech sell-off sent U.S. benchmark indexes lower overnight, while Asia markets traded lower Tuesday.
